summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trust Units Management UI enhancement. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend page layout, settings card, summary section, certificates table, filter dropdown, and all dialogs (Issue, Edit, Transfer, PDF Preview) verified working correctly.

backend_api: GET /api/trust-units/summary - Returns settings, certificates, and aggregates (200)
GET /api/trust-units/summary - Settings include total_authorized_units, unit_label, allow_fractional
POST /api/trust-units/certificates - Creates new certificate with sequential numbering (CU-XXX)
POST /api/trust-units/certificates - Validates units don't exceed authorized total
PATCH /api/trust-units/certificates/{id} - Can change status to cancelled
GET /api/trust-units/certificates/{id}/pdf - Generates PDF with pdf_base64 and filename
GET /api/trust-units/certificates/{id}/pdf - PDF content is valid (PDF magic bytes)
GET /api/trust-units/certificates/{id}/pdf - Works for cancelled certificates too
Summary aggregates: total_issued_units equals sum of active certificates
frontend_ui: Units navigation link visible in sidebar under Structures group
Page title shows 'Trust Units' with trust name subtitle
Settings card at top with editable fields: total_authorized_units, unit_label, allow_fractional
Save Changes button appears when settings are modified
Summary section shows read-only: Total Issued (35 units), Remaining (65 units), Active Certificates (5)
Certificates table renders with columns: Certificate #, Holder, Units, Percentage, Status, Issue Date, Actions
Filter dropdown with 'Active Only' / 'All Certificates' options
Issue Units button opens Issue New Certificate dialog
Issue Certificate dialog has fields: Holder Name, Holder Identifier, Units, Issue Date, Notes
Transfer button visible (enabled when active certificates exist)
Row action buttons: Print, Edit, Reissue, Cancel for active certificates
Print Certificate opens PDF preview dialog with Download PDF button
PDF preview shows iframe with certificate content

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation endpoint properly returns base64-encoded PDF with certificate details
PDF includes trust name, jurisdiction, certificate number, holder, units, percentage, and signature blocks
Settings card layout with editable inputs at top and read-only summary below follows good UX pattern
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Row actions (Print, Edit, Reissue, Cancel) correctly show/hide based on certificate status
seed_data_creation: Demo data created via 'USE DEMO DATA' button - Smith Family Trust with 5 active certificates totaling 35 units
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Units feature fully functional. Backend PDF endpoint GET /api/trust-units/certificates/{id}/pdf tested and working. Frontend /trust/units page shows Settings card (editable), Summary (read-only), and Certificates table with all CRUD actions. PDF preview dialog opens with Download PDF button. Test data includes CU-004 (John Smith, 24 units), CU-005, CU-006, CU-008, CU-009.

trust_units_page.nav_item: Units link in sidebar under Structures group
trust_units_page.layout: Settings card at top, Summary section, Certificates table below

pdf_generation.content: Trust name, jurisdiction, certificate number, holder, units, percentage, signature blocks
